Our Products

Premium PVC Interior Systems

Modular, durable and beautifully crafted — our PVC systems are designed for every space and every style

Linear Profiles
Core Product

Linear
Profile System

Modular linear PVC profiles that can be assembled and disassembled with minimal tools. Versatile, elegant, and built for both interior and exterior spaces.

📐
Modular Design
Easy to install, disassemble and reconfigure — adapts to any spatial requirement
🎨
30+ Colours & Finishes
Wood, marble, stone, abstract — wide range to match every interior aesthetic
💧
100% Moisture Resistant
Ideal for kitchens, bathrooms and high-humidity areas — never warps or rusts
⚡
LED Integration Ready
Designed with channels for seamless LED strip lighting integration
Infill Panels
Gap Filler

Infill
Panel System

Designed to complement linear profiles — infill panels fill gaps for a seamless, unified look while enhancing lighting integration across walls and ceilings.

🔲
Seamless Integration
Fills gaps between profiles for a clean, polished finish in any configuration
💡
Light Enhancement
Improves aesthetics and light distribution in office, retail and residential spaces
🏗️
Versatile Configurations
Semi-open or fully enclosed — works in commercial, residential and institutional projects
🔧
Easy Maintenance Access
Removable panels allow easy access to ceiling systems for maintenance
Wall Systems
Wall Solutions

PVC Wall
Panel System

Transform plain surfaces into dynamic, functional walls with depth and character. Perfect for interior and exterior walls in all building types.

🪟
30+ Panel Styles
Marble, wood grain, stone, abstract — stunning finishes for every taste
🏠
Interior & Exterior
UV-resistant and weather-proof — suitable for both indoor and outdoor walls
🛡️
Impact Resistant
Durable construction resists scratches, dents and everyday wear
🧽
Easy to Clean
Wipe-clean surface — hygienic and ideal for hospitals, kitchens and schools
Ceiling Systems
Ceiling Solutions

PVC False
Ceiling System

Striking overhead spaces that combine functionality with visual appeal. LED-ready, moisture-resistant ceilings for retail, office and residential settings.

🏠
20+ Ceiling Designs
From flat panels to 3D coffers — wide range of styles for any room
💡
LED-Ready Channels
Built-in channels for cove lighting, downlights and ambient LED strips
🌡️
Temperature Resistant
Overlapped edge connection handles thermal expansion without cracking
⚖️
Lightweight Yet Strong
Lightweight construction that supports up to 20kg at a single point

Who We Are

About Limitless
Interior

Limitless Interior brings you exceptional PVC home décor solutions, combining modern aesthetics with durability to elevate hotels, villas, restaurants and offices across Uttar Pradesh. We believe every space has untapped potential — we unlock it with precision, passion and creativity.

🚀
Mission

Deliver world-class interior solutions combining beauty, durability & affordability — making premium décor accessible to every home and business across India.

🏆
Vision

Become the most trusted interior design brand across Uttar Pradesh — consistently delivering innovative spaces that inspire living and exceed expectations.

⭐
Values
Quality Creativity Trust On-Time Delivery Customer Satisfaction Innovation
